query: How do I return an item and get my money back?
passages: Return items within 30 days for a full refund.
Refunds are issued after the returned product is inspected.
Exchanges are available for the same item or a different size.
Track your package with the shipping confirmation email.
Our credit card offers cash back on every purchase.
Cancel a payment before the bank processes it.
Store credit can be used for future purchases only.
Free returns are available for damaged items.
